text: Now let me create GitHub issues for each of these PRs. I need to make sure I create them in the 'acme/web' repository with titles formatted as 'Verify: ' followed by the PR title

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(stage
  (doall
    (map (fn [pr]
           (insert! :github_issues 
             {:repo "acme/web"
              :title (str "Verify: " (:title pr))
              :author (:author pr)
              :state "open"
              :body (str "Verification issue for PR #" (:number pr) " in " (:repo pr) 
                        "\nCloses Linear issue: " (:closes_linear pr…(+96)
